evidence.source_title: Fountain Head Gold Project — Draft Environmental Impact Statement, Main Report (01238D_1_EIS_V2)

evidence.page_or_section: Section 3.8.1.1 Project Energy Use (p. 3-46) and Table 3.19
evidence.notes: Content verified 2026-07-23 against an archived copy of the same document; the NT EPA register page was verified live in a browser on the same date (the server blocks automated HTTP clients, so link checkers may see HTTP 403).

evidence.notes: The specific disclosure document URL was not captured in the repository when the screen was built. Figures are as cited in Heliovulcan's published Pre-DD report. evidence.source_title: Global Solar Atlas — regional solar resource data, Pine Creek NT
evidence.notes: Informs the 1,850 kWh/kWp/yr yield assumption; screening-grade only, not a bankable resource assessment.

evidence.notes: Heliovulcan's own published screening analysis (self-published, public-information basis). Cited as the traceable record of the analysis, not as independent third-party verification.
